issues.title: Allow QuestionAnswerAdvisor to update the expression filters at runtime.
issues.body:
Currently the `QuestionAnswerAdvisor` can be configured with a default `SearchRequest` allowing to specify default `Expression.Filter`.

When the `QuestionAnswerAdvisor` is registered as a default advisor and reused in multiple `call()`/`stream()` invocations, it is necessary to   
allow customising the default filter expressions for each call.

issues.title: Ability to specify Opensearch `pathPrefix` using configuration properties
issues.body:
**Expected Behavior**
Ability to specify `pathPrefix` using configuration properties (similar to `spring.elasticsearch.path-prefix`)

**Current Behavior**
Have to configure a `OpenSearchClient` bean to set `pathPrefix`

**Context**
Opensearch server is running behind a reverse proxy with a path other then `/`

issues.title: Opensearch similarity search should include index name
issues.body:
**Bug description**
`SearchRequest` does not include index name which results in an error when using Opensearch role `own_index`:
*no permissions for [indices:data/read/search] and User [name=...]*

**Environment**
Spring AI 1.0.0-SNAPSHOT
Java 21,
Opensearch 2.14.0

**Steps to reproduce**
Create an user with permissions for a single index (e.g. role `own_index`)

**Expected behavior**
Should be able to execute the similarity search without errors

**Minimal Complete Reproducible example**
Not available...

comments.body: I have addressed this issue in the submitted PR #1435. I kindly request your review of the changes. Thank you! 😊
